support.title: Express Technical Support

faq.how_increase_fps: How to increase FPS in games?
faq.how_increase_fps_answer: To increase FPS, you can use Voltris Optimizer to disable useless Windows services, optimize power plan, clean temporary files and adjust system latency for your specific hardware.
faq.remote_formatting: Does VOLTRIS do remote PC formatting?
faq.remote_formatting_answer: Yes, we perform computer and notebook formatting remotely and securely, with data backup and optimized driver installation for maximum performance.
faq.work_performance: How does Voltris Optimizer improve work performance?
faq.work_performance_answer: The software removes background processes that consume CPU and RAM, ensuring your work tools (Office, Adobe, Browsers) have maximum hardware priority.

footer.description: Specialists in remote technical support and computer optimization for maximum performance worldwide.
